title: Roos Inc. We did it! Voted Best Attorney and Law Firm in George!
description: BUSINESS NEWS - We are celebrating this...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - We are celebrating this moment with hearts full of gratitude!


> Thank you to the incredible people of George, to our loyal clients across South Africa and even across the globe who continue to support and trust us - this win is yours too.


A special shout out to our Roos Inc. team - our biggest cheerleaders and hardest workers. Your dedication and passion are the reasons we get to celebrate milestones like this.

To our family and friends, thank you for standing beside us, believing in us and cheering us on every step of the way.

A heartfelt thank you to George Herald for this wonderful initiative and opportunity.

We are humbled and proud in declaring that passion led us here.

Our director, Alta Roos, extends a warm invitation to all:

"Come visit our offices in George, meet our incredible team, and discover the wide range of legal services we offer.

"From property transfers, trusts and deceased estate administration to litigation in both high - and magistrate's court, mediation and more.

"We remain committed to serving with excellence."

Please contact us:

Email – [email protected]

Telephone - 082 410 9066

To visit our website, click here.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
